title: lotus heermannii var. orbicularis
intro: Lotus heermannii var. orbicularis, also known as the Chinese lotus, is a rare and unique aquatic plant native to China and Southeast Asia, belonging to the Nelumbo genus. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its rhizome, which is rich in alkaloids and flavonoids, and has been traditionally used in Chinese medicine to treat various health issues. The rhizome of Lotus heermannii var. orbicularis has been used to lower blood sugar levels, reduce inflammation, and improve cardiovascular health, among other benefits. Herbal preparations of this plant include dried rhizome, which can be decocted in water or made into a tea, as well as extracts that can be used in supplements or topical applications.
